subcategory: Concentric rings pulsing loader with orbiting dots
use_cases: Display loading state while fetching data from APIs
Show progress indicator during form submissions
Indicate async operation in progress on page transitions
Provide visual feedback during file uploads or processing
Use as loading spinner for content-heavy sections
ai_summary: A canvas-based concentric rings loading animation with pulsing opacity effects and orbiting dots. Features customizable size, color, and ring count. The animation creates a visually engaging loading indicator suitable for any async operation or data fetching state in web applications.
